nasb.text: They have sown wheat and have reaped thorns, They have strained themselves to no profit. But be ashamed of your harvest Because of the fierce anger of the Lord.”

esv.text: They have sown wheat and have reaped thorns; they have tired themselves out but profit nothing. They shall be ashamed of their harvests because of the fierce anger of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 他們種的是小麥，收的卻是荊棘； 雖然筋疲力竭，卻一無所獲。 因耶和華的烈怒， 他們必為自己的出產羞愧。

ccb.text: 我的子民播种麦子， 却收割荆棘； 辛勤耕耘，却一无所获。 他们必因耶和华的烈怒而收获羞辱。”
